beIN SPORTS 1.title: Bayern München vs Paris Saint-Germain - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Semi Finals - 2nd leg
beIN SPORTS 1.desc: Paris SG 5-4 Bayern Munich in the first leg was the highest scoring European Cup semi-final match since Eintracht Frankfurt beat Rangers 6-3 in 1959-60. Across both legs, in major European competition the most goals in any semi-final was in that Frankfurt – Rangers tie, which ended 12-4 on aggregate to the German side. In UEFA Champions League history, only one team has ever scored five goals in a knockout match and then been eliminated in that tie, which was Manchester City against Monaco in the last 16 in 2016-17.

beIN SPORTS 1.desc: Aston Vila are unbeaten in each of their last 10 meetings with Nottingham Forest at Villa Park across all competitions, since a 2-0 loss in the Premier League in October 1994 under Ron Atkinson. Nottingham Forest are unbeaten in each of their three European games against fellow English opposition, keeping a clean sheet each time  – their only previous away match was at Anfield versus Liverpool in the 1978-79 European Cup first round, drawing 0-0.

beIN SPORTS 1.title: Lens vs Nantes - French Ligue 1 2025/2026 Week 33
beIN SPORTS 1.desc: Lens have not lost any of their last 10 home matches against Nantes in Ligue 1, since a 1-0 defeat in March 2003 at the Stade Bollaert-Delelis. Lens could mathematically secure a top two finish in Ligue 1 in this match, for the second time after 2022-23. Since Lens' promotion in 2020-21, only Paris SG  and Marseille  have finished in the top two on multiple occasions.

beIN SPORTS 1.title: Arsenal vs Atlético de Madrid - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Semi Finals - 2nd leg
beIN SPORTS 1.desc: Arsenal remain unbeaten against in the Atlético Madrid in the UEFA Champions League, winning 4-0 at the Emirates and drawing 1-1 at the Riyadh Air Metropolitano Stadium this season. Only two other managers have gone unbeaten in their first three games against Atlético boss Diego Simeone in the competition: Carlo Ancelotti and Maurizio Sarri. Winless in their two games against Arsenal this season, Atlético Madrid last faced an opponent 3+ times in a single campaign without managing a victory in 2022-23, versus Real Madrid.

beIN SPORTS 4.desc: Ligue 2 is the second division of French football. beIN SPORTS 4.original_title: Metz vs Monaco - French Ligue 1 2025/2026 Week 32
beIN SPORTS 4.title: Metz vs Monaco - French Ligue 1 2025/2026 Week 32
beIN SPORTS 4.desc: Metz have lost 15 of their last 16 Ligue 1 matches against Monaco, including each of the last seven. In fact, only against Paris SG  have FCM lost more in the top-flight in the 21st century than against ASM. Metz have lost seven of their last eight home games against Monaco in Ligue 1, as many as in their first 40.

beIN SPORTS 4.original_title: Nice vs Lens - French Ligue 1 2025/2026 Week 32
beIN SPORTS 4.title: Nice vs Lens - French Ligue 1 2025/2026 Week 32
